snippet: Language assistants are allocated to government schools on an annual basis from Terms 2 to 4 through the Language Assistants Program (LAP). The LAP is managed by the Languages Unit, Curriculum and Teaching Practice Division. The following school types are eligible for LAP funding, which is allocated to the host school: Funding is calculated at the Confirmed budget cycle and allocated through credit funding. Fully funded language assistant = FTE × ES Salary Rate (Range 1.2.1) Partially funded language assistant = FTE × 0.7 × ES Salary Rate (Range 1.2.1)
